zh.lifeSummary: 當Mabel Wroth於1542年出生在英國米德萊可恩費爾德時，她的父親Sir Thomas Wroth26歲，母親Mary Rich16歲。她於1560年7月14日與Sir Edward Aucher I在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 彼得 可恩爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1597年8月8日在她的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在英國肯特坎特布瑞坎特布瑞 聖 彼得。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mabel Wroth于1542年出生在英国米德萊可恩費爾德时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Wroth26岁，母亲Mary Rich16岁。她于1560年7月14日与Sir Edward Aucher I在英国英格兰倫敦聖 彼得 可恩爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1597年8月8日在她的家乡享年55岁，埋葬在英国肯特坎特布瑞坎特布瑞 聖 彼得。

nameMeanings.name: Mabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Mabel Wroth was born in 1542, in Enfield, Middlesex, England, her father, Sir Thomas Wroth, was 26 and her mother, Mary Rich, was 16. She married Sir Edward Aucher I on 14 July 1560, in St Peter Cornhill, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 8 August 1597, in her hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in Canterbury St Peter, Canterbury, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mabel Wroth est née en 1542, à Enfield, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Wroth, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mary Rich, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Edward Aucher I le 14 juillet 1560, à St Peter Cornhill, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 8 août 1597, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Canterbury St Peter, Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mabel Wroth 1542 in Enfield, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Wroth 26 und ihre Mutter Mary Rich 16. Sie hat am 14. Juli 1560 in St Peter Cornhill, London, England, United Kingdom Sir Edward Aucher I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 8. August 1597 im Alter von 55 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Canterbury St Peter, Canterbury, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mabel Wroth è nata il nel 1542 nel Enfield, Middlesex, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Wroth, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Mary Rich, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Sir Edward Aucher I il 14 luglio 1560, nel St Peter Cornhill, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 8 agosto 1597, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Canterbury St Peter, Canterbury, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mabel Wrothが1542年にイギリスミッドレセックスエンフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Wrothは26歳，母Mary Richは16歳であった。1560年7月14日にイギリスイギリスロンドンスト ペター コルンヒルでSir Edward Aucher Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1597年8月8日に故郷で55歳で死去し，イギリスケントカンテルブリーカンテルブリー スト ペターにて埋葬された。

ko.Canterbury St Peter, Canterbury, Kent, E: 영국 켄트 캉르버이 캉르버이 스트 피터
ko.St Peter Cornhill, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 피터 코른힐
ko.lifeSummary: Mabel Wroth(이)가 1542년 영국 미들레세스 필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Wroth(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Rich(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1560년 7월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 피터 코른힐에서 Sir Edward Aucher I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1597년 8월 8일 그녀의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 캉르버이 캉르버이 스트 피터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mabel Wroth nasceu em 1542, em Enfield, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Wroth, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mary Rich, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Edward Aucher I em 14 de julho de 1560, em St Peter Cornhill, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 8 de agosto de 1597, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Canterbury St Peter, Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mabel Wroth родилась в 1542 г. в местности энфиелд, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Wroth было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Rich, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edward Aucher I 14 июля 1560 г. в местности ст питир корнилл, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 8 августа 1597 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности кантирбури ст питир, кантирбури, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mabel Wroth nació en 1542, en Enfield, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Wroth, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mary Rich, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Sir Edward Aucher I el 14 de julio de 1560, en St Peter Cornhill, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 8 de agosto de 1597, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Canterbury St Peter, Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.
